job.title: IT Project Manager
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an IT Project Manager, you lead digital transformation and cloud migration projects for our clients. You are the key point of contact between technical teams and decision-makers.
mission.1: Define project scope: perimeter, schedule, budget, and risks
mission.2: Lead steering committee meetings and write minutes
mission.4: Track quality, cost, and deadline indicators (QCD)
mission.6: Manage client relationships and project satisfaction
mission.7: Write deliverables: requirements specifications, acceptance reports, and project reviews
profile.1: Master's degree (Bac+5) in Computer Science or Project Management
profile.2: 3 to 7 years of experience in IT project management
profile.3: Certification PMP, PRINCE2 ou CAPM is a plus
profile.5: Leadership, rigour, and excellent communication skills
